releases.name: AcreetionOS
releases.summary: The official AcreetionOS release featuring the Cinnamon desktop environment
description: AcreetionOS is a user-friendly, privacy-focused Linux distribution based on Arch Linux. It features the Cinnamon desktop environment, XLibre stability, and a curated selection of tools designed for performance and repository sovereignty.

releases.name: AcreetionOS XL
releases.summary: The XLibre edition of AcreetionOS with enhanced compatibility
description: AcreetionOS XL (XLibre) edition provides enhanced hardware compatibility and additional drivers for a wider range of devices.
